name: Data Table
description: Foldkit-native shadcn Data Table composition helpers and examples built on the local Table primitive plus a small query-state model for filtering, sorting, selection, visibility, and pagination.

registry.reason: Examples render payment, task status, and priority surfaces with local Badge helpers.
Examples use local Button helpers for sorting, actions, and pagination controls.
The tasks example presents the denser table workflow inside a local Card layout.
Examples use local Checkbox helpers for row selection and page selection.
Examples use the local Dropdown Menu primitive for column visibility controls.
Examples use local Input helpers for column filter controls.
Examples use local Pagination helpers for first, previous, next, and last page controls.
Examples use the local Select primitive for rows-per-page choices.
Data Table composes the local Table primitive for its rendering surface.
The query model exports local layout class helpers through the shared cn utility.

runtime.reason: Provides Html and message helpers for the Foldkit-native examples.
Provides Schema literals and collection helpers for the local query model.
Provided through the shared utils/cn registry dependency.
Provided through the shared utils/cn registry dependency.

development.reason: The origin guide depends on TanStack React Table; installable Foldkit source replaces it with a local query model.
Row reordering is deferred to a later native DragAndDrop follow-up.
Row reordering is deferred to a later native DragAndDrop follow-up.
React is origin fixture evidence only, not installable Foldkit source.
React DOM is origin fixture evidence only, not installable Foldkit source.
Dashboard chart follow-up work is explicitly deferred.
Dashboard toast follow-up work is explicitly deferred.
Origin task example schema validation is fixture evidence only.
Installable source uses local inline SVG icons instead of Lucide React.
Installable source uses local inline SVG icons instead of Tabler React icons.

examples.title: DataTableDemo
examples.description: Payments table with email filtering, sortable columns, selection, and pagination.

examples.title: DataTableTasks
examples.description: Task table with badges, column visibility, and rows-per-page controls.

examples.title: DataTableRtl
examples.description: RTL payments table with Arabic copy, selection, filtering, and pagination.

deviations.summary: Data Table is accepted from docs and example evidence because no primary base-nova component source file exists.
deviations.rationale: The origin docs position Data Table as a composition guide rather than a single reusable primitive.

deviations.summary: Installable source replaces TanStack React Table row models and React state with a local Foldkit query-state helper.
deviations.rationale: Filtering, sorting, selection, visibility, and pagination must stay installable without React or TanStack runtime dependencies.

deviations.summary: Dashboard row reordering, chart, drawer, and toast integrations are deferred from first-slice acceptance.
deviations.rationale: Those flows need separate native foundations and follow-up examples beyond the base Data Table guide.

deviations.summary: Installable source uses local inline SVG icons instead of Lucide React or Tabler React icons.
deviations.rationale: The examples preserve the visible affordances while keeping the registry item installable.
